steps.title: Find the center of the solutions
steps.content:
For $|-5x+13|=73$, the two solutions lie the same distance from the value that makes the inside zero.
$$-5x+13=0\Rightarrow x=\frac{13}{5}$$

steps.title: Use symmetry
steps.content:
Because $\frac{13}{5}$ is the average of the two solutions, their sum is twice that value.
$$2\left(\frac{13}{5}\right)=\frac{26}{5}$$
The answer is D.
